name: Whisper Fine-Tuning
short_description: Domain-adapted fine-tuning of Whisper-class ASR models on Rezolve production audio to improve entity accuracy.
detailed_description: Covers experiments that adapt pre-trained Whisper (or Whisper-derived) models to the Rezolve voice commerce domain. Tasks include dataset preparation from production audio, supervised fine-tuning runs, hyperparameter sweeps, and post-fine-tune evaluation on the gold-92 benchmark. A key constraint is that fine-tuned models must not regress general English WER relative to the base checkpoint. Gold-92 is never used for training — only for held-out evaluation.
